family_summary: Repair-pass bundle for the full-scale phase of the Russia-Ukraine war, split into city- and subregional episodes so that direct-death numerators and exposed-population denominators are not diluted by whole-country totals.
notes: Conflict remains ongoing; end_date is the bundle as-of date. This repair pass promotes only one episode (Chernihiv city siege) to a full DR estimate and leaves the rest explicit but incomplete.
